title: A Spectral Sequence from Khovanov Homology to Knot Floer Homology
journal: Journal of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
A well-known conjecture of Rasmussen states that for any knot 

  
    K
    K
  

 in 

  
    
      S
      
        3
      
    
    S^{3}
  

, the rank of the reduced Khovanov homology of 

  
    K
    K
  

 is greater than or equal to the rank of the reduced knot Floer homology of 

  
    K
    K
  

. This rank inequality is supposed to arise as the result of a spectral sequence from Khovanov homology to knot Floer homology. Using an oriented cube of resolutions construction for a homology theory related to knot Floer homology, we prove this conjecture.
